details.summary: PulseMCP does not provide a public API, GitHub PR mechanism, or any other automated submission channel. Submission is only possible via a manual web form at https://www.pulsemcp.com/submit, which is behind Cloudflare protection. The read-only API at GET /v0.1/servers was confirmed operational, but no write/submit endpoint exists (POST to /v0.1/servers returns 405 Method Not Allowed). Submission requires a public GitHub repository and a ~2-minute web form entry.
research_sources: openMCP/meok-cross-post DISTRIBUTION.md - PulseMCP listed as manual-only directory
Raycast PulseMCP extension - confirmed read-only API with X-API-Key header
Direct API probing - GET /v0.1/servers works, POST returns 405, no submit path found
